languages.text: "Это мы называем "навскидочку", Лорд-капитан. Когда надо не в цель стрелять или бить, а туда, где она появится".
"We call it the 'snap-strike,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting or stabbing where the target is, but where it's going to be."
languages.original_text: "Это мы называем "навскидочку", Лорд-капитан. Когда надо не в цель стрелять или бить, а туда, где она появится".

traits.locale_text: "We call it 'the snap-shot,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting where the target is, but where it's going to be."
"We call it 'the snap-shot,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting where the target is, but where it's going to be."
"We call it the 'snap-shot,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting where the target is, but where it's going to be."
"We call it the 'snap-shot,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting where the target is, but where it's going to be."

languages.text: “我们管这叫‘预判打击’，舰长大人。不是瞄准目标现在的位置发起攻击，而是预判目标下一刻会出现的位置。”
languages.original_text: "We call it the 'snap-strike,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting or stabbing where the target is, but where it's going to be."

traits.locale_text: “我们管这叫‘预判打击’，舰长大人。不是瞄准目标现在的位置发起攻击，而是预判目标下一刻会出现的位置。”

languages.text: "Biz buna 'ansız atak' diyoruz Lord Kaptan. Hedefin nerede olduğuna değil, nerede olacağına ateş etmek veya bıçağı oraya yönlendirmek kısacası."
languages.original_text: "We call it the 'snap-strike,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting or stabbing where the target is, but where it's going to be."

traits.locale_text: "Biz buna 'ansız atak' diyoruz Lord Kaptan. Hedefin nerede olduğuna değil, nerede olacağına ateş etmek veya bıçağı oraya yönlendirmek kısacası."

languages.text: « C'est ce qu'on appelle un "tir anticipé", {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Il ne s'agit pas de tirer ou de frapper là où se trouve la cible, mais plutôt à l'endroit où elle va se rendre. »
languages.original_text: "We call it the 'snap-strike,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting or stabbing where the target is, but where it's going to be."

traits.locale_text: « C'est ce qu'on appelle un "tir anticipé", {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Il ne s'agit pas de tirer ou de frapper là où se trouve la cible, mais plutôt à l'endroit où elle va se rendre. »

languages.text: «Lo llamamos "ataque precipitado", Lord Capitán. No se trata de apuntar o apuñalar adonde está el objetivo, sino adonde va a estar».
languages.original_text: "We call it the 'snap-strike,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting or stabbing where the target is, but where it's going to be."

traits.locale_text: «Lo llamamos "ataque precipitado", Lord Capitán. No se trata de apuntar o apuñalar adonde está el objetivo, sino adonde va a estar».

languages.text: "Wir nennen das 'Schnappschuss', Lord Captain. Es geht nicht darum, auf das Ziel zu schießen, sondern auf seine zukünftige Position."
languages.original_text: "We call it the 'snap-strike,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting or stabbing where the target is, but where it's going to be."

traits.locale_text: "Wir nennen das 'Schnappschuss', Lord Captain. Es geht nicht darum, auf das Ziel zu schießen, sondern auf seine zukünftige Position."

languages.text: 「我々はこれを「スナップショット」と呼ぶ、艦長。狙いの的は、今いる場所ではなく、これから行く場所だ」
languages.original_text: "We call it the 'snap-shot,' Lord Captain. It's not about shooting where the target is, but where it's going to be."

traits.locale_text: 「我々はこれを「スナップショット」と呼ぶ、艦長。狙いの的は、今いる場所ではなく、これから行く場所だ」
